name: Hubei Forbon Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hubei Forbon Technology Co.,Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells fertilizer additives worldwide. The company offers fertilizer auxiliary products, including anti-caking agents, parcels, phosphate ore flotation and energy saving products, granulation improvers, sustained release materials, calcium activated loosening agents, and corrosion inhibitors, as well as slow release materials for fertilizers. It has operations in China, Malaysia, the Philippines, Indonesia, Vietnam, Taiwan, etc. The company is based in Yingcheng, China.
